name: inngest
description: Official Inngest plugin for Codex: skills and MCP wiring for brownfield audits, durable functions, durable agents, event-driven workflows, flow control, middleware, realtime updates, v3-to-v4 migrations, and API CLI operations.

interface.shortDescription: Audit codebases and build durable workflows and agents with Inngest.
interface.longDescription: Inngest teaches Codex how to audit an existing TypeScript/JavaScript codebase for durability gaps, add, debug, migrate, and evolve durable functions, event schemas, step-based workflows, durable agent flows, flow-control policies, middleware, realtime UI updates, and alpha API CLI operations for Cloud and local environments. It also wires Codex to the local Inngest dev server MCP endpoint when available.
defaultPrompt: Audit this codebase for Inngest opportunities.
Create a durable AI agent workflow.
